title: Leadership review on ProductOS PM workflow scope
summary: Leadership aligned on focusing the next increment on PM operating rhythm automation and requested bi-weekly status mail support.
decisions: Make bi-weekly status mail a first-class ProductOS output.
Prioritize issue logs and transcript-derived next steps ahead of broader meeting automation.

action_items.description: Add status mail, issue log, and meeting record schemas.

open_questions: What minimum PM input is required when system records are incomplete?
issues_raised: PMs risk becoming manual communication routers when status cadence is not automated.
